summary: Completed comprehensive pre-deployment testing of EcommBX banking application. All critical features verified and working correctly. Backend APIs: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend UI: All key features tested and verified.

backend_issues.notes: All backend APIs working correctly. No issues found.

design_issues.issue: Button height is 20px (could be improved for better touch target)
design_issues.recommendation: Consider increasing button padding to achieve minimum 44x44px touch target
design_issues.current_status: Button is functional and clickable, just smaller than ideal

passed_tests: Admin login flow - Successfully authenticated with admin@ecommbx.io
User login flow - Successfully authenticated with test user ashleyalt003@gmail.com
Support ticket creation - User can create tickets via /api/v1/tickets/create
Admin support tickets list - VERIFIED: user_name and user_email fields are present in ticket list (KEY FEATURE)
User view own tickets - User can view their support tickets
Admin KYC queue - Admin can view 5 pending KYC applications
Manual queue user API - Endpoint working correctly (returns appropriate error when user already approved)
User view accounts - User can view account with balance (€29,950.00)
User view transactions - User can view 6 transactions for their account
Mobile landing page header - Language selector visible (EN)
Mobile landing page header - Theme toggle button (44x44px) is clickable and working
Mobile landing page header - Menu button (44x44px) is clickable and working
User dashboard - 'Need Help?' section is visible at bottom of dashboard
User dashboard - 'Contact Support' button is visible and clickable
Mobile dashboard - 'Need Help?' section is visible on mobile (390px viewport)
Mobile dashboard - 'Contact Support' button is visible and clickable on mobile
Admin KYC queue UI - Pending applications displayed correctly with count
Admin KYC queue UI - '+ Queue User' button is visible and accessible

key_features_verified.feature: Admin Support Tickets - Client Name and Email Display
key_features_verified.details: Admin tickets endpoint returns user_name and user_email for each ticket. Sample verified: user_name='Amazing Amazing', user_email='ashleyalt003@gmail.com'
'Need Help?' section with 'Contact Support' button is visible to ALL users on their dashboard (not just tax-holded users)

key_features_verified.feature: Mobile Landing Page - Header Icons Accessibility
key_features_verified.details: All header icons (Language, Theme, Menu) have proper touch targets (44x44px) and are clickable on mobile (390px viewport)
Contact Support section is visible and accessible on mobile dashboard. Button is clickable (note: height is 20px, could be improved)
KYC queue displays correctly with 5 pending applications. Applications show user names, nationalities, submission dates, and document counts
'+ Queue User' button is visible and functional. API endpoint working correctly (tested via backend API)

core_banking_features.details: Test user can login successfully with email verification
Admin can login with SUPER_ADMIN role
User can view 6 transactions with proper display
Users can create tickets, admins can view all tickets with user information

recommendations.item: Consider increasing the Contact Support button padding on mobile to achieve minimum 44x44px touch target for better accessibility
recommendations.current_state: Button is functional but height is 20px
recommendations.impact: Minor - button is still clickable, just smaller than ideal
